description: SQLite roundtrip task 1: read data.csv, drop null values, remove duplicate rows, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip1.db in table people_rows, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from people_rows, then export to g_roundtrip1.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 2: read data.csv, select name, department, region, salary, cast column types using an empty mapping, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip2.db in table employee_rows, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from employee_rows, then export to g_roundtrip2.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 3: read data.csv, drop null values, filter rows where score is greater than 0.2, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip3.db in table score_rows, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from score_rows, then export to g_roundtrip3.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 4: read data.csv, drop null values, remove duplicate rows, select name, status, signup_date, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip4.db in table customer_rows, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from customer_rows, then export to g_roundtrip4.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 5: read input.json, validate schema, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip5.db in table raw_events, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from raw_events, then export to g_roundtrip5.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 6: read data.csv, drop null values, cast column types using an empty mapping, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip6.db in table people_rows, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from people_rows, then export to g_roundtrip6.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 7: read data.csv, drop null values, remove duplicate rows, sort by salary descending, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip7.db in table employee_rows, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from employee_rows, then export to g_roundtrip7.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 8: read data.csv, drop null values, filter rows where score is greater than 0.4, cast column types using an empty mapping, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip8.db in table score_rows, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from score_rows, then export to g_roundtrip8.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 9: read data.csv, filter rows where status equals active, sort by signup_date ascending, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip9.db in table active_customers, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from active_customers, then export to g_roundtrip9.csv.

SQLite roundtrip task 10: read input.json, validate schema, apply a data transformation with no operations, store into a SQLite database called g_roundtrip10.db in table events, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows from events, group by event_type and count occurrences, then export to g_roundtrip10.csv.
